subject: writing
activity_templates: A kindergarten letter tracing worksheet for a single uppercase letter. Four rows of large dotted-line letters (each spanning the height of a handwriting line) for the child to trace. Header displays the letter and a cute cartoon example word. {{character}} holds a pencil and traces the first letter.

A pair-letter tracing worksheet (uppercase and lowercase of the same letter). Two rows for each, all dotted for tracing. A cartoon picture of a word starting with that letter appears in the top-right corner. {{character}} waves underneath.
A name-practice style worksheet with blank practice rows showing one letter repeated in dotted-line form at different sizes, decreasing in size row by row. {{character}} cheers at the top.

A find-and-trace worksheet: a big cartoon scene with the target letter hidden 5 times. Child circles each instance, then traces a row of the letter at the bottom. {{character}} is in the scene holding a magnifying glass.
